dep-class-gap-notes-format: TS prefixes the dep_class_gap_annotation note with 'dep_class_gap: '; Python appends the raw annotation with no prefix. Advisory-only (INV-07), doesn't affect risk_state/block_mask. Filed by T10, not fixed — human to decide which formatting is canonical.
dep-class-gap-empty-string: TS treats an explicit empty-string dep_class_gap_annotation as absent (truthy check); Python treats it as present (`is not None` check) and appends an empty-string note. Filed by T10, not fixed — human to decide correct semantics for an explicit empty string vs. an absent/null annotation.
